human.name: Human
human.trait_description: Gain proficiency in one additional skill of your choice.

elf.name: Elf
elf.trait_description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.trait_description: Advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

halfling.name: Halfling
halfling.trait_description: When you roll a 1 on an attack, ability check, or saving throw, reroll the die and use the new roll.

tiefling.name: Tiefling
tiefling.trait_description: You have resistance to fire damage.

half_orc.name: Half-Orc
half_orc.trait_description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead. Usable once per long rest.

dragonborn.name: Dragonborn
dragonborn.trait_description: Choose a dragon type. You have resistance to that damage type, and can use Breath Weapon once per short rest.
